title: lastrea fragrans
intro: Lastrea fragrans, also known as the Fragrant Lady Fern, is a species of fern belonging to the genus Lastrea, native to the tropical forests of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to the presence of compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Lastrea fragrans include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies such as poultices and salves.
